---
title: "Soo Min Kimm"
subtitle: "Deep Chat of Perplexity"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: profile.png
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/somnio-kimm
    - text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=3wFHPnEAAAAJ
    - text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/0009-0006-5662-9627
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/somnio-kimm/
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:somnio.kimm@gmail.com
---

I'm **Soo Min Kimm**, a researcher in **embodied AI and robot learning** at **Tommoro Robotics**. I hold an **M.S. in Electrical & Computer Engineering** and a **B.S. in Electrical Engineering** and **Mathematics** from the **University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign**.

I like turning hard ideas into small, working things — from vision–language–action models for robots down to circuits on a breadboard. *Deep Chat of Perplexity* is where I think out loud about them.

**Currently:** training and evaluating vision–language–action models at Tommoro Robotics, and a co-author on [Habilis-β](https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.18813).

## What you'll find here

- **[Notes](notes/index.qmd)** — deep dives into the ML papers I'm reading, worked through from the math up.
- **[Publications](publications.qmd)** — preprints and my M.S. thesis.
- **[Talks](talks.qmd)** — seminar slides.
- **[CV](cv.qmd)** — the full record.
